titleStmt.title: SII 24.122: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 122. (A.R. No. 33 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of land by purchase, by Śīr-Iḷaṅkōṉ Tirunāḍuḍaiyāṉ for feeding Śrīvaishṇava pilgrims on new moon days and ten Malayāṇa(ḷa) Brāhmaṇas during the Paṅguṉi festival. This gift is placed under the protection of the Abhimānabhūshaṇar of the three maṇḍalas. The record is dated in the 16th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālaimiṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻntarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷ puyattirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppat tan varai mārvan taṉateṉap peṟṟuThe phrase ‘tirumakaḷoru taṉiyiruppa’ has been dropped.k kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu [ ṉā
vakattiruppa ticaitoṟum tikariyoṭu] ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvanamum kalippa tor putumatipola veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpa karuṅkali Oḷittu vanpilattiṭai kkiṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅka vīmaṉ vilaṅkal mimicai yeṟavum
kaliṅka pūmiyai kanaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅkiyum veṅkaimaṇṭalat tāṅkiṉitiruntu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉṟicai tarumamum tānamum tavamum taḻaippa vetamum meymmaiyu mātiyukam polat talaittalai ciṟappa
vantaruḷi velaṟkarum porppuliyāṉai pārttivar cūṭa niṟai maṇi makuṭam muṟaimayiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellām miṉṉuyirttāy poṟṟaṇ Oḷi parap pit taṉittaṉi parattu maṇmuḻutu kaḷippa maṉu neṟi vaḷarttu taṉ koyiṟ koṟṟa vācaṟ
[puṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vijaiya]mum pukaḻum meṉmeloṅka vāḻi vāḻi mānilaṅ kākkat tirumaṇi poṟ ṟeṭṭeḻutu pattāṇṭu varumuṟai munne maṉṉavar cumantu tiṟai niraittuc corinta cempoṟk kaiyāl tan kulanāya
kaṉ tāṇṭavam puriyum cempoṉ Ampalañcūḻ tirumāḷikaiyum kopura vācalil kūṭa cāḷamum Ulaku valaṅ koṇṭoḷi viḷaṅku nemi kulavarai Utaiyakuṉṟa moṭu niṉṟenap pacumpoṉm meyntu pala vaḷar piṭamum vicum
poḷit taḻaippa viḷaṅkupoṉ mentu Irunilan taḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippap periya tirunāḷ perum per viḻāvennum Uyar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭātiyil Ampala niṟaitta Aṟputak kūttar Inpar vāḻa Eḻuntaruḷuvataṟkut tirutterk koyil cemponimayattu parutiraḷ muttiṉ payilvaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭun terviti tiruvaḷar perāl ceytu camaittaruḷi paimpo
ṟ kuvitta parikalamutalāl cempoṟ kaṟpakattoṭu paricciṉṉamum Aḷavillātaṉa Oḷipeṟa vamaittup pattāmāṇṭu cittirait tiṅkaḷattam peṟṟa Ātittavārat tut tiru
vaḷarpatiyil tiraiyodaśi pakkattu Iḷanaṉa palavum Initu camaittaruḷit taṉ Oru kuṭaik kiḻ taraṇi muḻutum taḻaippa ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka vaḻitaru ciṅkaṇarañci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kaṇṇaṭar
ventiṭa koṅka rotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉnarun tantamak karaṇen tirumalar ceppi Urimaiyilaṟaiñci Āṅkavar cūḻuṅ kaṅkai yoppākiya terivaiyar tilatam tiyāka patākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi
puṉita kuṇavaṉitai puvaṉamuḻuvatuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruvuḷḷat taruḷu muḻutuṭai yāḷeṉa Uṭaniruppa neṭumālākattu piriyāteṉṟum mātar maṭamayil pūtalat tarun tati Araṇiya kaṟpiṟ taraṇimuḻutuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tirumaṇi mārvattaruḷuṭaniruppa cempo
n virasiṅhāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu [.] pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu Akaram brammateyam śrī
mummuṭic coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai Allūr viracoḻavatikku kiḻakku virarācentira vākkālukku teṟku Eṭṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal tuṇṭattu kiḻ panaṅ kāṭṭu nari
svaramuṭaiyār tirunan=tavanattukkuk kiḻakku Allūr kiṇaṟum peruvaḻikku vaṭakku centiṟattu Iḷaiyanārāyaṇa paṭṭan mākāṇikku meṟku tiruvuṭkuṭi teva tānam tevimacakkalukku teṟ
ku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilamākāṇiyum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷaṭiyāril ciriḷaṅkon tirunāṭuṭaiyānen Ittevaṟku patinmunṟāvatum patinālāvatum Ivvūr muṟic ceṭṭu māta
vapaṭṭan pakkalum puḷḷimaṅkalattu ciṅkappirānāna caṭakopa paṭṭan pakkalum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷanṟāṭu naṟkācu patinañcu Ikkācu patinañcu Iṭṭu tanmārttamā
ka Ivviruvar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu Amāvāsi śrīvayiṣṇavarka(ā)ḷāy Apūrvi kaḷāyirukkum brā(rā)hmaṇaraiyum Amutu ceyvikkakaṭavatākavum paṅkunit tirunāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumā
ḷ Eḻuntaruḷum potu paradeśikaḷāyirukkum malaiyāḷabrāhmaṇar nittam pattu śrī vayiṣṇavar Amutu ceyyak kaṭavatākavum Ipparicu Ivviraṇṭu tanmamum catirātittaval cellakkaṭavi
tākavum Ittanmañ cellumiṭattu Innilam mākāṇikkum Ūr māvintavari Iṟuttu Itil mikutikoṇṭu muṟicceṭṭu mātavapaṭṭarai Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavarāka Ippaṭi sammatittu kalve
ṭṭuvittukkuṭutten Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷaṭiyāril ciriḷaṅkon tirunāṭuṭai yānen Itil mikitik kuṟaivuḷḷana Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷaṭiyārk kaykkoḷare Ārāyntu kuṭukkakkaṭavarākavum Itu munṟuma
ṇṭalattu Apimāna bhūṣaṇar Irakṣai—
Digital edition of SII 24.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
